family: Straight Spacers - Precision, Configurable Length and Inner Diameter (DWSS series)
pn_grammar_source: manufacturer-confirmed: configured spec page resolved this exact PN string to a live, orderable part with matching dimensions (Outer Diameter D=7.5mm, Inner Diameter=5mm, Thickness/Length=3mm, Material=304 Stainless Steel) and a real price/lead-time quote
cad_reason_unavailable: MISUMI CAD-download dialog returns 'CAD data is not available for this product' for all offered formats -- custom-ground precision spacer family does not generate parametric CAD
lead_time: Ships ~4 days (quoted Thu Jun 25, 2026 against a Jun 21, 2026 order date); page also carries an 'Attention: longer lead times for this product' notice -- treat lead time as a soft risk

evidence_tier_summary.unthreaded_plain_bore: manufacturer-confirmed (dimensioned drawing shows plain annulus cross-section, no thread symbol, 4-C chamfer only)
evidence_tier_summary.geometry_independent_of_drawing: UNRESOLVED -- no CAD obtainable, so no independently-measured 3D geometry exists for this candidate beyond the 2D drawing + spec table
